subject: [PATCH v9 13/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a new ioctl, UFFDIO_SET_MODE, to toggle the async mode of userfaultfd at runtime without requiring re-registration. The ioctl takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags and only allows toggling of RWP_ASYNC mode today. It also includes changes to handle pending sync waiters when switching to async mode and ensures lockless observer safety.
